name: The Golf Doctor - DC
address: 1108 K St NW Floor 3, Washington, DC 20005
about: The Golf Doctor-DC is Washington D.C.'s most advanced golf fitting center, offering a comprehensive performance-based club fitting process developed over 22 years. The venue utilizes TrackMan 4 technology and a vast inventory of club options to customize equipment to a golfer's unique swing, offering both individual fitting sessions and full bag packages. Their services are geared toward players of all skill levels, from beginners to PGA Tour winners, and they distinguish themselves by handling both the fitting and club building in-house to ensure the final product matches the prescribed specifications.
why_golfers_like_it: Uses state-of-the-art TrackMan 4 launch monitor for precise ball flight data
Offers thousands of test club combinations for optimal fitting
Fitter and builder is the same person, ensuring clubs match the prescription
Provides a significant discount for bundled Full Bag Fitting sessions
Extended evening fitting hours available on Tuesdays and Thursdays

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art launch monitor used for fitting and practice

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can use your own clubs for fitting or practice, The Golf Doctor-DC provides over thousands of different test club combinations to find the optimal fit for your swing. Trade-in options for your current clubs are also available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website does not specify any information regarding outside food or drink policies. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for clarification on their BYOB policy.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a standard duration for an 18-hole simulator session. Time estimates can vary based on the number of players and pace of play, but it is typically similar to playing on a real course.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The Golf Doctor-DC offers an 'Introductory Clubfitting' session designed for beginners, which suggests they accommodate junior golfers looking to start with properly sized equipment. However, there is no explicit mention of specific kid-friendly amenities or policies.
